reduceModal.title: Reduce Licenses
reduceModal.enterpriseOnly: This feature is only available in the Enterprise Edition.

purchaseForm.title: License Purchase
purchaseForm.enterpriseOnlyHosted: License purchasing is available in the Enterprise Edition for hosted deployments.
purchaseForm.communityEditionUnlimited: Self-hosted Community Edition has unlimited users at no additional cost.

purchasePage.title: Purchase Licenses
purchasePage.description: Add more user licenses to your AlgaPSA account

purchaseSuccess.scheduledDescription: Your license change has been scheduled and will take effect at the end of your current billing period.
purchaseSuccess.updatedDescription: Your license update has been processed successfully!

scheduledSteps.currentLicenses: Your current licenses remain active until the end of the billing period
scheduledSteps.autoUpdate: The license count will automatically update on the scheduled date
scheduledSteps.emailConfirmation: You'll receive an email confirmation when the change takes effect

updatedSteps.activeReady: Your licenses are now active and ready to use
updatedSteps.createUsers: You can create new users immediately from User Management
updatedSteps.invoiceProrated: Your next invoice will include the prorated charges

checkout.title: Complete Your Purchase
checkout.summary: You are purchasing {{quantity}} {{licenseLabel}} at {{price}} per license per {{interval}}.

confirmation.title: Confirm License Update
confirmation.increaseDescription: Review the details of your license increase before confirming.
confirmation.decreaseDescription: Review the details of your license decrease. Changes will take effect at the end of your billing period.
confirmation.immediateChargeDescription: You will be charged {{amountDue}} now for the prorated amount.
confirmation.prorationDescription: Proration: {{amount}} for the remainder of this billing period
confirmation.scheduledDescription: License decrease will take effect on {{date}} at the end of your current billing period.
confirmation.scheduledKeepAccess: You'll keep access to all {{count}} licenses until then.

help.totalLicenseCount: Enter the new total number of licenses (minimum: {{minimum}}). Currently: {{current}}
help.reduceViaAccount: To reduce licenses, visit Account Management
help.quantityWarning: Warning: You have {{used}} users but are setting the total to {{quantity}}

info.totalQuantity: This sets your total subscription quantity (not an addition to current licenses)
info.increasingImmediate: Increasing licenses: Immediate access with prorated charge
info.billedMonthly: Licenses are billed monthly and can be canceled anytime

solo.title: Solo includes one user
solo.description: The Solo plan is designed for a single user and does not support adding licenses. Upgrade to Pro to add more users to your team.

removalModal.title: Remove Licenses
removalModal.description: Remove licenses from your account. Changes will take effect at the end of your current billing period.

validation.positiveInteger: License quantity must be a positive integer (minimum 1)
validation.useAddFlow: Use the "Add Licenses" flow to increase licenses
validation.deactivateUsers: You have {{activeUsers}} active users. Please deactivate {{usersToDeactivate}} {{userLabel}} first.

scheduled.title: Removal will be scheduled
scheduled.description: Your license count will decrease from {{current}} to {{next}} at the end of your current billing period.
scheduled.creditDescription: You'll receive a credit on your next invoice for the unused licenses.

confirmation.description: Please review and confirm your license removal:
confirmation.creditNotice: Changes will take effect at the end of your current billing period. You'll receive a prorated credit on your next invoice.

errors.removeFailed: Failed to remove licenses. Please try again.

success.scheduled: License removal scheduled! Your license count will change from {{current}} to {{next}} on {{effectiveDate}}.

workflowDesigner.unavailable: Workflow designer requires Enterprise Edition. Please upgrade to access this feature.

runStudio.unavailable: Workflow Run Studio is not available in this edition. (runId: {{runId}})

aiConsent.title: AI data sharing
aiConsent.subtitle: Required for AI features on this appliance. Review what leaves your network before turning AI on.
aiConsent.unreachable: Could not reach the AI service to load the current consent status. Try again shortly.
aiConsent.explainer: When AI is enabled, the content AI works on — including ticket text, email bodies, and chat messages — is sent from this appliance to the Nine Minds cloud AI service, and from there to third-party model providers to generate responses. Nothing is sent until you grant consent below.

acceptDialog.title: Enable AI data sharing?
acceptDialog.body: By continuing you agree that AI features may transmit ticket, email, and chat content from this appliance to the Nine Minds cloud AI service and onward to third-party model providers for processing.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke AI data sharing?
revokeDialog.body: AI features stop working immediately across this appliance. No further content will be sent to the cloud AI service until consent is granted again.

aiBalance.title: AI credits
aiBalance.subtitle: Prepaid credits fund AI features on this appliance. Purchases are made in the Nine Minds store.
aiBalance.unreachable: Could not reach the AI service to load your credit balance. Try again shortly.
aiBalance.blockedPendingConsent: AI is blocked until data-sharing consent is granted above. Credits are not consumed while AI is off.

upsell.heading: Subscribe to the AI add-on
upsell.body: There is no active AI subscription for this appliance. Subscribe in the Nine Minds store to receive a monthly credit allotment; the store manages payment and top-ups.

aiBalance.grace: Credits are exhausted. AI keeps working within a small grace buffer of {{grace}} credits before it hard-stops — top up to avoid interruption.
aiBalance.low: Credit balance is running low. Top up in the store to avoid interruptions.

manage.heading: Buy credits or manage the subscription
manage.body: Top-ups, auto-top-up, and subscription changes are handled in the Nine Minds store.
